<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="crDiJKkdO3sTOuWfHGFn" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-540" dy="-214" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="LLM Customization Strategy Decision Tree" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="560" x="160" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="START: I need to customize an LLM for my use case" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="380" x="250" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q1" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Does the model need real-time or frequently updated information?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="420" x="230" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Is the model already capable of the task with just better prompting?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="420" x="230" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q3" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Do you need task-specific behavior, tone, or domain expertise encoded into the model weights?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="420" x="230" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q4" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;" value="Do you have labeled training data (>500 examples) and GPU resources?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="420" x="230" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rag" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Use RAG
(Retrieval-Augmented Generation)

Best for: Dynamic data, factual accuracy,
up-to-date info, low hallucination" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="240" x="720" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Use Prompt Engineering

Best for: Quick iteration, no training data,
flexible outputs, low cost" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="240" x="720" y="325" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ft" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Use Fine-Tuning

Best for: Specialized tasks, custom tone,
domain expertise, consistent format" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="240" x="720" y="475" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rag_pe" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="Consider Combining
RAG + Fine-Tuning

Best for: Production systems needing
both accuracy and specialization" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="240" x="720" y="635" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="q1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="rag" value="YES"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="q1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="q2" value="NO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pe" value="YES"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="q3" value="NO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="q3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ft" value="YES"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="q3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="q4" value="NO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="q4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="rag_pe" value="YES"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="q4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pe" value="NO - use Prompt Engineering first"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="80" y="690" /> <mxPoint x="80" y="380" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
